summary: Tested all new features: VSS branding, gender/school fields, Class Overview page (/overview), Progress Tracker component. All 7 backend tests passed (100%). All UI flows verified via Playwright (100% pass).

issues: Hero image shows VSS logo with dark background - appears as a dark square with 'S' rather than the actual vertical logo. The navbar logo renders correctly. Minor visual inconsistency but functional.

critical_code_review_comments: ProgressTracker.jsx line 29: `if (uniqueExamTypes.length < 2) return null;` - only requires 2 unique exam types but doesn't require they be for different exam_type values per student. Works correctly since each DB record is separate student entry.
ClassOverview.jsx line 214: Complex inline expression for class overall avg - could be extracted to a helper function for readability, but functionally correct.
server.py: /api/progress uses case-insensitive regex match for student name which is correct for finding records across different exam types.
seed_data_creation: TEST_FemaleYuHua, TEST_ProgressUI (Mid-term), TEST_ProgressUI (Final) created and deleted after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: VSS logo in navbar (img tag, not BookOpen icon), VSchool Smart Centre + Bandar Tek Kajang branding in navbar and dashboard hero, 3 nav links (Dashboard/Students/Overview), gender Male/Female toggle buttons in add form, school dropdown with 4 options (SJKC Yu Hua/Sin Ming/Bandar Kajang 2/Others), gender+school shown in student card list and detail page, /overview page with standard selector and comparison table with Class Avg footer row, Progress Tracker line chart renders on detail page when >=2 records with different exam_types exist for same student name. CSV has Gender+School columns. All backend APIs working.
